things.name: Titanic Belfast
things.description: World-class visitor experience telling the story of the Titanic, built in Belfast

things.name: Giant's Causeway
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage site of 40,000 interlocking basalt columns on the Antrim coast

things.name: Cathedral Quarter
things.description: Vibrant cultural district with art galleries, theatres and Belfast's best nightlife

things.name: Ulster Museum
things.description: Fascinating collection covering art, history and natural sciences

things.name: Crown Liquor Saloon
things.description: Ornate Victorian gin palace - the most flamboyant pub in Ireland

things.name: Belfast Botanic Gardens
things.description: Victorian gardens with the stunning Palm House and Tropical Ravine

things.name: Cave Hill Country Park
things.description: Landmark hill with Napoleon's Nose promontory and panoramic city views

things.name: Black Taxi Tour
things.description: Fascinating tour of the political murals and Peace Walls of Belfast

things.name: St Anne's Cathedral
things.description: Early 20th-century Hiberno-Romanesque cathedral in the Cathedral Quarter

things.name: Carrickfergus Castle
things.description: Best-preserved Norman castle in Ireland on the shores of Belfast Lough
